  1509→  <div class="stag rev">Questions Answered</div>
  1510→  <h2 class="stitle rev">What every Irish<br>homeowner <em>asks.</em></h2>
  1511→  <div class="faqwrap">
  1512→    <div class="rev">
  1513→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">Do I need planning permission?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">In most cases, no. Solar PV panels are exempt from planning permission in Ireland under standard residential installation criteria. We confirm during your free survey.</div></div>
  1514→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">How much will panels produce in Ireland?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">A typical 4kWp system in Ireland produces 3,400–3,800 kWh per year — around 85% of the average Irish household's consumption. Modern panels generate 10–25% of peak output even under heavy cloud.</div></div>
  1515→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">How long does installation take?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">The install itself is one day. From first contact to live panels is typically 4–5 weeks — survey, fixed quote, SEAI application and installation. You track every step in your portal.</div></div>
  1516→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">Can I sell electricity back to the grid?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">Yes. All major Irish suppliers now offer a Clean Export Guarantee tariff. You need a smart meter — we arrange this as part of installation. Most customers earn €200–400/year from export.</div></div>
  1517→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">What warranty do I get?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">25-year performance warranty on panels. 10-year warranty on the inverter. 5-year workmanship warranty on our installation. All documented in your portal.</div></div>
  1518→      <div class="fi3"><div class="fq" onclick="tf(this)">Is my roof suitable?<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg></div><div class="fa3">South, south-west and south-east facing roofs are ideal. East and west can work. Flat roofs are fine with mounting frames. We'll tell you honestly if solar isn't right — we'd rather lose the sale.</div></div>
  1519→    </div>
  1520→    <div class="faqsb rev">
  1521→      <h3>Still have questions?</h3>

  1667→<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
  1668→var hsl=['1–2 bed','2 bed','3 bed','4+ bed'];
  1669→var sys=[2.0,3.5,4.5,6.0]; // typical Irish installs: 1-2bed=2.0, 3bed=3.5, 4bed=4.5, large=6.0kWp
  1670→var gr=[1400,1700,1800,1800]; // engine-aligned SEAI tiers: €700/kWp to 2kWp + €200/kWp to 4kWp, cap €1,800
  1671→var cf={carlow:1.02,wexford:1.05,kilkenny:1.03,wicklow:1.01,kildare:1.01,laois:1.01,dublin:1.00,meath:1.00,louth:0.99,longford:0.98,offaly:0.99,westmeath:0.98,galway:0.98,mayo:0.96,sligo:0.95,roscommon:0.97,leitrim:0.94,clare:1.02,cork:1.06,kerry:1.05,limerick:1.02,tipperary:1.02,waterford:1.04,cavan:0.98,donegal:0.93,monaghan:0.98,antrim:0.96,armagh:0.97,belfast:0.96,derry:0.94,down:0.97,fermanagh:0.95,tyrone:0.96}; // PVGIS-based irradiance factors
  1672→// ─── SMART ORIENTATION DEFAULTS BY COUNTY ─────────────────────────────────
  1673→// South-biased counties get "south" pre-selected; east-coast get east/west suggestion
  1674→var COUNTY_ORIENT = {
  1675→  cork:'south', kerry:'south', wexford:'south', waterford:'south',
  1676→  limerick:'south', clare:'south', tipperary:'south',
  1677→  wicklow:'east', dublin:'east', louth:'east',
  1678→  galway:'south', mayo:'south', sligo:'south'
  1679→};
  1680→// House type inference: map savings-calc slider index → estimator house value
  1681→var HS_TO_HOUSE = ['terraced','semi','semi','detached'];
  1682→
  1683→function showBadge(id){ var b=document.getElementById(id); if(b){ b.style.display='inline-flex'; } }
  1684→function hideBadge(id){ var b=document.getElementById(id); if(b){ b.style.display='none'; } }
  1685→
  1686→// ─── MASTER SYNC: keeps both calculators in harmony ───────────────────────
  1687→function syncCalculators(source){
  1688→  // source = 'savings' | 'estimator' | 'bill'
  1689→  var ccEl    = document.getElementById('cc');
  1690→  var reCounty= document.getElementById('re-county');
  1691→  var hsSel   = document.getElementById('hs');
  1692→  var spEl    = document.getElementById('sp');
  1693→  var reBill  = document.getElementById('re-bill');
  1694→  var reHouse = document.getElementById('re-house');
  1695→  var reOrient= document.getElementById('re-orient');
  1696→
  1697→  if(source === 'savings'){
  1698→    // County changed in savings calc → push to estimator
  1699→    if(ccEl && reCounty && ccEl.value){
  1700→      var cval = ccEl.value;
  1701→      if(reCounty.value !== cval){
  1702→        reCounty.value = cval;
  1703→        showBadge('badge-county');
  1704→      }
  1705→      // Apply smart orientation default if estimator hasn't been touched by user
  1706→      if(reOrient && !reOrient.dataset.userSet && COUNTY_ORIENT[cval]){
  1707→        if(reOrient.value !== COUNTY_ORIENT[cval]){
  1708→          reOrient.value = COUNTY_ORIENT[cval];
  1709→          showBadge('badge-orient');
  1710→        }
  1711→      }
  1712→    }
  1713→    // House slider → infer house type in estimator
  1714→    if(hsSel && reHouse){
  1715→      var idx = parseInt(hsSel.value) - 1;
  1716→      var inferred = HS_TO_HOUSE[idx] || 'semi';
  1717→      if(reHouse.value !== inferred){
  1718→        reHouse.value = inferred;
  1719→        showBadge('badge-house');
  1720→      }
  1721→    }
  1722→    // Spend slider → sync to estimator bill field
  1723→    if(spEl && reBill){
  1724→      var sv = parseInt(spEl.value);
  1725→      if(parseInt(reBill.value) !== sv){
  1726→        reBill.value = sv;
  1727→        showBadge('badge-bill');
  1728→      }
  1729→    }
  1730→  }
  1731→
  1732→  if(source === 'estimator'){
  1733→    // County changed in estimator → push to savings calc
  1734→    if(reCounty && ccEl){
  1735→      ccEl.value = reCounty.value;
  1736→    }
  1737→    // Mark orientation as user-set so auto-fill won't overwrite it
  1738→    if(reOrient) reOrient.dataset.userSet = '1';
  1739→    // Bill → push back to savings slider (clamp to slider range 1200–4800)
  1740→    if(reBill && spEl){
  1741→      var bv = parseInt(reBill.value)||2200;
  1742→      spEl.value = Math.max(1200, Math.min(4800, Math.round(bv/100)*100));
  1743→    }
  1744→    // House → push to savings slider
  1745→    if(reHouse && hsSel){
  1746→      var hmap = {terraced:1, cottage:1, semi:2, bungalow:3, detached:4, farmhouse:4};
  1747→      hsSel.value = hmap[reHouse.value] || 2;
  1748→    }
  1749→  }
  1750→
  1751→  if(source === 'bill'){
  1752→    // Bill AI analysis → pre-fill both calculators
  1753→    var spend = parseInt(reBill ? reBill.value : 2200) || 2200;
  1754→    if(spEl){
  1755→      spEl.value = Math.max(1200, Math.min(4800, Math.round(spend/100)*100));
  1756→    }
  1757→    // Infer house type from spend level
  1758→    var inferredHouse = spend >= 3200 ? 'detached' : spend >= 2400 ? 'semi' : spend >= 1800 ? 'semi' : 'terraced';
  1759→    if(reHouse && reHouse.value !== inferredHouse){
  1760→      reHouse.value = inferredHouse;
  1761→      showBadge('badge-house');
  1762→    }
  1763→    var hmap2 = {terraced:1, cottage:1, semi:2, bungalow:3, detached:4, farmhouse:4};
  1764→    if(hsSel) hsSel.value = hmap2[inferredHouse] || 2;
  1765→    if(reBill) showBadge('badge-bill');
  1766→  }
  1767→}
  1768→
  1769→
  1770→// ── BUTTON LOADING STATE UTILITIES ───────────────────────────────────────────
  1771→function btnLoad(btn, loadText){
  1772→  if(!btn || btn._loading) return;
  1773→  btn._loading = true;
  1774→  btn._origHTML = btn.innerHTML;
  1775→  btn._origDisabled = btn.disabled;
  1776→  btn.disabled = true;
  1777→  var spinCls = (btn.classList.contains('pg-submit') || btn.classList.contains('wsub-btn') || btn.classList.contains('btn-lime') || btn.classList.contains('btn-p')) ? 'btn-spin dark' : 'btn-spin';
  1778→  var _sp=document.createElement('span'); _sp.className=spinCls;
  1779→  var _lt=document.createElement('span'); _lt.textContent=loadText||'Sending…'; _lt.style.marginLeft='6px';
  1780→  btn.innerHTML=''; btn.appendChild(_sp); btn.appendChild(_lt);
  1781→  btn.classList.add('loading');
  1782→}
  1783→function btnReset(btn){
  1784→  if(!btn || !btn._loading) return;
  1785→  btn.disabled = btn._origDisabled || false;
  1786→  btn.innerHTML = btn._origHTML || btn.innerHTML;
  1787→  btn.classList.remove('loading');
  1788→  btn._loading = false;
  1789→}
  1790→function btnSuccess(btn, text, delay){
  1791→  if(!btn) return;
  1792→  btn.disabled = true;
  1793→  var spinCls = 'btn-spin dark';
  1794→  var _sv = document.createElement('span');
  1795→  _sv.innerHTML = '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" style="vertical-align:middle;margin-right:5px"><path d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"/></svg>';
  1796→  var _st = document.createElement('span');
  1797→  _st.textContent = text || 'Done!';
  1798→  btn.innerHTML = ''; btn.appendChild(_sv); btn.appendChild(_st);
  1799→  btn.classList.remove('loading');
  1800→  btn.style.background = 'var(--lime-dk)';
  1801→  btn.style.color = 'var(--black)';
  1802→  if(delay) setTimeout(function(){ btnReset(btn); btn.style.background=''; btn.style.color=''; }, delay);
  1803→}
  1804→// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1805→
  1806→// ── SMOOTH SCROLL WITH FIXED-NAV OFFSET ──────────────────────────────────────
  1807→var NAV_OFFSET = 72; // nav ~60px + 12px breathing room
  1808→
  1809→function scrollToId(id) {
  1810→  var target = document.getElementById(id);
  1811→  if (!target) return;
  1812→  var nav = document.querySelector('nav');
  1813→  var navH = nav ? nav.getBoundingClientRect().height : NAV_OFFSET;
  1814→  var top = target.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - navH - 12;
  1815→  window.scrollTo({ top: Math.max(0, top), behavior: 'smooth' });
  1816→}
  1817→
  1818→// Intercept all internal anchor clicks
  1819→document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  1820→  var anchor = e.target.closest('a[href^="#"]');
  1821→  if (!anchor) return;
  1822→  var hash = anchor.getAttribute('href');
  1823→  // Skip empty hashes, JS-only links, and links with their own onclick scroll logic
  1824→  if (!hash || hash === '#' || hash === '#0') return;
  1825→  var target = document.querySelector(hash);
  1826→  if (!target) return;
  1827→  e.preventDefault();
  1828→  scrollToId(target.id);
  1829→  // Update URL hash without jumping
  1830→  if (history.pushState) history.pushState(null, null, hash);
  1831→}, false);
  1832→
  1833→// Handle page load with a hash in the URL
  1834→(function() {
  1835→  if (!window.location.hash) return;
  1836→  var id = window.location.hash.slice(1);
  1837→  setTimeout(function() { scrollToId(id); }, 120);
  1838→})();
  1839→// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1840→
  1841→// ── Unified calculator entry point ─────────────────────────
  1842→function ucalcRun(){
  1843→  // Update display labels immediately (feels instant)
  1844→  var hsList = ['1–2 bed','2 bed','3 bed','4+ bed'];
  1845→  var hsEl = document.getElementById('hs');
  1846→  var spEl = document.getElementById('sp');
  1847→  var ccEl = document.getElementById('cc');
  1848→  var lbl = document.getElementById('u-hs-lbl');
  1849→  var slbl = document.getElementById('u-sp-lbl');
  1850→  var clbl = document.getElementById('u-county-lbl');
  1851→  if(hsEl && lbl) lbl.textContent = hsList[parseInt(hsEl.value)-1] || '3-bed';
  1852→  if(spEl && slbl) slbl.textContent = '€' + parseInt(spEl.value).toLocaleString();
  1853→  if(ccEl && clbl) clbl.textContent = ccEl.options[ccEl.selectedIndex].text;
  1854→  uc();
  1855→}
  1856→
  1857→// Wire old ID aliases so existing code works
  1858→function ucalcSetView(v){
  1859→  roiView = v;
  1860→  var _uba=document.getElementById('ucalc-btn-annual'); if(_uba) _uba.classList.toggle('on', v==='annual');
  1861→  var _ubc=document.getElementById('ucalc-btn-cumulative'); if(_ubc) _ubc.classList.toggle('on', v==='cumulative');
  1862→  // also sync old buttons if they exist
  1863→  var ba = document.getElementById('roi-btn-annual');
  1864→  var bc = document.getElementById('roi-btn-cumulative');
  1865→  if(ba) ba.classList.toggle('on', v==='annual');
  1866→  if(bc) bc.classList.toggle('on', v==='cumulative');
  1867→  renderRoiChart();
  1868→}
  1869→
  1870→function uc(){
  1871→  // Sync county label (ucalcRun wrapper also does this but uc can be called directly)
  1872→  var ccSyncEl=document.getElementById('cc');
  1873→  var clblSync=document.getElementById('u-county-lbl');
  1874→  if(ccSyncEl && clblSync && ccSyncEl.selectedIndex >= 0) clblSync.textContent=ccSyncEl.options[ccSyncEl.selectedIndex].text;
  1875→  var si=parseInt(document.getElementById('hs').value)-1;
  1876→  document.getElementById('hsv') && (document.getElementById('hsv').textContent=hsl[si]);
  1877→  var uhs=document.getElementById('u-hs-lbl'); if(uhs) uhs.textContent=hsl[si];
  1878→  var sp=parseInt(document.getElementById('sp').value);
  1879→  document.getElementById('spv') && (document.getElementById('spv').textContent='€'+sp.toLocaleString());
  1880→  var usp=document.getElementById('u-sp-lbl'); if(usp) usp.textContent='€'+sp.toLocaleString();
  1881→  var f=cf[document.getElementById('cc').value]||1;
  1882→  var sav=Math.round(sys[si]*240*f); // engine-aligned: ~€240/kWp/yr (35% self-use @ €0.35 + export @ €0.20, 950kWh/kWp)
  1883→  var grant=gr[si];
  1884→  var net=Math.round(sys[si]*1650)-grant;
  1885→  var pb=(net/sav).toFixed(1);
  1886→  var s25=Math.round(sav*29-net); // 25yr w/ 2%/yr price inflation & 0.5%/yr degradation ≈ 29× yr-1
  1887→  ['rs','rg','rp','r25'].forEach(function(id){
  1888→    var el=document.getElementById(id);
  1889→    if(!el)return;
  1890→    el.classList.remove('pop');
  1891→    void el.offsetWidth;
  1892→    el.classList.add('pop');
  1893→    el.addEventListener('animationend',function(){el.classList.remove('pop');},{once:true});
  1894→  });
  1895→  document.getElementById('rs').textContent='€'+sav.toLocaleString();
  1896→  document.getElementById('rg').textContent='€'+grant.toLocaleString();
  1897→  document.getElementById('rp').textContent=pb+' yrs';
  1898→  document.getElementById('r25').textContent='€'+s25.toLocaleString();
  1899→  // Push changes to estimator
  1900→  syncCalculators('savings');
  1901→  // Also re-run estimator calc silently so its results stay fresh
  1902→  if(typeof reRecalc === 'function') reRecalc('silent');
  1903→  // Update ROI chart and save prefs
  1904→  renderRoiChart();
  1905→  saveCalcPrefs();
  1906→}
  1907→// ─── ROI TIMELINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1908→var roiView = 'cumulative'; // locked to cumulative
  1909→
  1910→function setRoiView(v){
  1911→  roiView = v;
  1912→  var _rba=document.getElementById('roi-btn-annual'); if(_rba) _rba.classList.toggle('on', v==='annual');
  1913→  var _rbc=document.getElementById('roi-btn-cumulative'); if(_rbc) _rbc.classList.toggle('on', v==='cumulative');
  1914→  renderRoiChart();
  1915→}
  1916→
  1917→// Legacy alias used by old toggle button reference
  1918→function toggleRoiView(){ setRoiView(roiView==='annual'?'cumulative':'annual'); }
  1919→
  1920→function renderRoiChart(){
  1921→  var spEl  = document.getElementById('sp');
  1922→  var hsSel = document.getElementById('hs');
  1923→  var ccEl  = document.getElementById('cc');
  1924→  if(!spEl || !hsSel) return;
  1925→
  1926→  var si    = parseInt(hsSel.value) - 1;
  1927→  var sp    = parseInt(spEl.value) || 2400;
  1928→  var f     = cf[ccEl ? ccEl.value : 'dublin'] || 1;
  1929→  var grant = gr[si];
  1930→  var sav   = Math.round(sys[si] * 240 * f); // engine-aligned
  1931→  var netCost = Math.round(sys[si] * 1650) - grant;
  1932→
  1933→  // Build 25-year dataset
  1934→  var YEARS = 25;
  1935→  var data = [];
  1936→  var cum = -netCost;
  1937→  var beYear = null;
  1938→  for(var y = 1; y <= YEARS; y++){
  1939→    cum += sav;
  1940→    if(beYear === null && cum >= 0) beYear = y;
  1941→    data.push({ year: y, annual: sav, cumulative: cum });
  1942→  }
  1943→
  1944→  // Update stats strip
  1945→  var el = document.getElementById('roit-saving');  if(el) el.textContent = '€'+sav.toLocaleString();
  1946→  el = document.getElementById('roit-cost');  if(el) el.textContent = '€'+netCost.toLocaleString();
  1947→  el = document.getElementById('roit-payback'); if(el) el.textContent = beYear ? beYear+' yrs' : (netCost/sav).toFixed(1)+' yrs';
  1948→  el = document.getElementById('roit-25yr');  if(el) el.textContent = '€'+data[YEARS-1].cumulative.toLocaleString();
  1949→
  1950→  var svg = document.getElementById('roi-svg');
  1951→  if(!svg) return;
  1952→  svg.innerHTML = '';
  1953→
  1954→  var W = 900, H = 300;
  1955→  var padL = 12, padR = 12, padT = 18, padB = 6;
  1956→  var chartW = W - padL - padR;
  1957→  var chartH = H - padT - padB;
  1958→
  1959→  var vals = data.map(function(d){ return roiView==='annual' ? d.annual : d.cumulative; });
  1960→  var minV = Math.min.apply(null, vals);
  1961→  var maxV = Math.max.apply(null, vals);
  1962→  // Annual: always base from zero so bars have proper height
  1963→  if(roiView==='annual'){ minV = 0; }
  1964→  // For cumulative, extend min a bit so zero-line is visible
  1965→  if(roiView==='cumulative') minV = Math.min(minV, -netCost * 1.05);
  1966→  var range = maxV - minV || 1;
  1967→
  1968→  function xOf(i){ return padL + (i / (YEARS - 1)) * chartW; }
  1969→  function yOf(v){ return padT + chartH - ((v - minV) / range) * chartH; }
  1970→
  1971→  var NS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  1972→  function svgEl(tag, attrs){
  1973→    var e = document.createElementNS(NS, tag);
  1974→    Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){ e.setAttribute(k, attrs[k]); });
  1975→    return e;
  1976→  }
  1977→
  1978→  // ── Background profit zone (above zero) ──────────────────────────────────
  1979→  if(roiView === 'cumulative'){
  1980→    var zeroY = yOf(0);
  1981→    // Green zone above zero
  1982→    var profitZone = svgEl('rect', {
  1983→      x: padL, y: padT, width: chartW, height: Math.max(0, zeroY - padT),
  1984→      fill: 'rgba(109,201,58,0.06)', rx: '4'
  1985→    });
  1986→    svg.appendChild(profitZone);
  1987→    // Red zone below zero
  1988→    var debtH = Math.max(0, H - padB - zeroY);
  1989→    if(debtH > 0){
  1990→      var debtZone = svgEl('rect', {
  1991→        x: padL, y: zeroY, width: chartW, height: debtH,
  1992→        fill: 'rgba(196,133,90,0.08)', rx: '0'
  1993→      });
  1994→      svg.appendChild(debtZone);
  1995→    }
  1996→    // Zero line
  1997→    var zLine = svgEl('line', {
  1998→      x1: padL, y1: zeroY, x2: padL + chartW, y2: zeroY,
  1999→      stroke: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)', 'stroke-width': '1.5', 'stroke-dasharray': '4,3'
  2000→    });
